intro: Beilschmiedia madang, also known as the Madang laurel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and inflammation, due to its reported health benefits such as antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Beilschmiedia madang include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
